info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Appointment Management API
info.description: The Appointment Management API allows users to schedule, modify, and manage appointments effectively. This service is essential for businesses needing to manage booking processes, optimize client interactions, and maintain organized schedules. Typical consumers include service providers in healthcare, beauty, and consultancy fields who rely on appointment systems to enhance customer service and operational efficiency. This API facilitates seamless integration with existing systems to ensure a smooth user experience.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment by providing the necessary details such as date, time, and client information. Successful creation returns the appointment details.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new appointment. It should include all required fields for the appointment details, ensuring that the provided data aligns with the expected schema.

200.description: Request completed successfully; the appointment has been created.

400.description: The request contains invalid parameters; please check your input.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred; please try again later.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Operation Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the result of the operation.

error.description: A message describing the error, if any occurred during the operation.

message.description: A human-readable message providing additional context.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path relevant to the operation that was executed.

trace.description: A trace of the operation for debugging purposes.

details.description: Detailed information about any error that occurred during the operation.

suggestion.description: Suggestions or next steps for the user regarding the operation.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema defines the response structure for the appointment operation POST request. It may include a timestamp, status, error details, and suggestions for further action.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

service.description: The name of the service that generated the error.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the type of error.

message.description: A specific message describing the error in context.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: HTTP status code for the error.

message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

suggestion.description: A suggested action for the client to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Creation Request

doctorId.description: Unique identifier for the doctor associated with the appointment.

appointmentDate.description: Date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

appointmentTime.description: Time of the appointment in HH:MM format.

department.description: Name of the department where the appointment will take place.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a new appointment.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the error type.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that generated the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error, useful for debugging.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on how to rectify the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Detailed error response for a failed appointment operation.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates the headers that might vary in responses, helping clients understand caching behavior.

Location.description: Provides the URL to the resource created or affected by the POST request.

content-type.description: Specifies the media type of the resource returned by the server, indicating how to interpret the response body.
